OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff La Salle Preservation Limited Partnership is present. Represented by Scherlyna Jackson.
Attorney James E. McDaniel appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Leela Molex is present.
Attorney Maureen Doran representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-14-2012 is vacated.
